title: euonymus huae
intro: Euonymus huae, also known as the Chinese spindle tree, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and reducing cholesterol levels, as well as treating conditions like fever and rheumatism. In terms of herbal preparations, the roots and stems of Euonymus huae are often used to make decoctions or infusions, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice.
